meaning: adj.第一位的,主要的,初步的,初级的,原来的,根源的
examples: We turn now to our primary question.
Computers are now commonplace in primary classrooms.
It comes in bright primary colours that kids will love.
For better and sometimes worse, these have been primary bulwarks of Jewish success in America.
For Black Americans, the primary figures have generally been preachers, notably Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
